name: libexception-class-perl
title: libexception-class-perl
summary: module that allows you to declare real exception classes in Perl
description:
module that allows you to declare real exception classes in Perl
Exception::Class allows you to declare exceptions in your modules in a
manner similar to how exceptions are declared in Java.
.
It features a simple interface allowing programmers to 'declare'
exception classes at compile time.  It also has a base exception
class, Exception::Class::Base, that can be used for classes stored in
files (aka modules ;) ) that are subclasses.
.
It is designed to make structured exception handling simpler and
better by encouraging people to use hierarchies of exceptions in their
applications.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libexception-class-perl because module that allows you to declare real exception classes in Perl.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libexception-class-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libexception-class-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libexception-class-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
